title: CadStruct V6 Protocol Recovery Plan
strategy: Do not start training until the input cache, launch script, report path, checkpoint ABI, and paper claim all refer to the same FloorPlanCAD protocol.
goal_completion_rule: Current phase is code review and data-protocol repair. If a later phase starts stable validation training, mark that future goal complete only after the process is visible and its first report is written.

audit_findings.summary: Existing v6-named runs were not true v6 input-protocol runs; they used v4 same-set caches and --input-feature-schema v4.
audit_findings.fix: Training now blocks output/report/checkpoint paths that claim a newer v5/v6 protocol than --input-feature-schema unless explicitly overridden for legacy audit.

audit_findings.summary: No full floorplancad_line_json_primitive_cache_windowed_*v6* cache was found in reports/vlm or datasets.
audit_findings.fix: Added scripts/build_floorplancad_v6_cache.sh to build primitive, windowed, and qsafe v6 caches without starting training.

pending_tasks.title: Build true v6 cache once
checks: Run the build script only when no conflicting disk-heavy process is active.
Confirm train/val/test source record counts match the official VecFormer FloorPlanCAD split.
Confirm target_schema_version and input_schema_version are v6 in the first train and val records.
pending_tasks.rollback: Delete only the generated v6 report/cache directories; do not touch v3/v4 caches.

pending_tasks.title: Promote v6 launch only after cache validation
checks: Use --input-feature-schema v6 and --require-target-schema-v6 for any v6-named run.
Keep v3/v4 launchers explicitly named as legacy or dev-only if retained.
Do not reuse v4 checkpoints as evidence for v6 protocol results.
pending_tasks.rollback: Revert launcher/config patch; the training preflight guard still prevents mislabeled output.

pending_tasks.title: Run protocol smoke before validation training
checks: Report feature_ingress for v6 with no blocked fields or semantic leakage.
Expose selected-primitive matching usage, admitted coverage, calibrated RQ, and proxy metric contract.
Abort if proxy scoring is not log1p-length weighted primitive IoU compatible.
pending_tasks.rollback: No data or checkpoint mutation beyond the smoke report.

pending_tasks.title: Decide seeded-query promotion gate
checks: Enable content/component seeded queries only with explicit ABI and preset tests.
Verify selected_primitive_indices diagnostics are non-empty before treating sparse matching as an RQ improvement.
Keep the remask policy explicit rather than hidden in defaults.
pending_tasks.rollback: Disable seeded-query flags; matching fallback remains compatible with dense queries.
